headline: Is American Water Works (AWK) Pricing Reflect Its Regulated Utility Stability?
summary: If you are wondering whether American Water Works Company is priced attractively right now, you are not alone. This article focuses on what the current share price could mean for long term investors. The stock most recently closed at US$137.73, with returns of 1.7% over the last 7 days, 10.8% over 30 days, 5.7% year to date, and a 5.4% decline over the past year. Taken together, this gives a mixed picture of recent performance. Recent news around American Water Works has largely centered on...

headline: Assessing American Water Works Company’s Valuation After Fruitridge Vista Modernization Milestone
summary: Why the Fruitridge Vista project matters for American Water Works Company (AWK) California American Water’s Austin Steiner Main Replacement Project, the final phase of a multi year Fruitridge Vista modernization effort, puts infrastructure reliability and metered efficiency at the center of the American Water Works Company (AWK) story for investors. headline: West Virginia Public Service Commission Authorizes New Rates for West Virginia American Water
summary: The West Virginia Public Service Commission issued an amended order on Thursday, March 5, 2026, approving new rates for West Virginia American Water. The approved rates represent a total annualized revenue increase of $20.5 million, which excludes $12.7 million in previously recovered infrastructure surcharges.
